title: tanacetum arisanense
intro: Tanacetum arisanense, also known as Arisan Tanacetum or White Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Tanacetum arisanense are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. Tanacetum arisanense is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
